aboutCard.title: About Us
aboutCard.body: 24-7 Labs is the first of a new line of innovative health care services from 24-7 Laboratory LLC. Our mission is to give people the power to control their health through convenient, affordable, and easy-to-understand options.
aboutCard.address: 6107 Memorial Hwy, Suite F Tampa, FL
aboutCard.hours: We work every day, 24 hours a day.

declarationContent: I hereby certify that the answers given above are true and complete to the best of my knowledge.
I have had an opportunity to ask questions and received satisfactory answers before requesting services.
By submitting this form, I agree to all declarations and company policies published on this site.
termsContent: I understand that 24-7 Labs acts as a collection facility and does not interpret laboratory results.
I understand I am financially responsible for all collection and test-related fees.
I understand my data is treated as protected health information in accordance with applicable law.
covidTermsContent: I understand this COVID screening information is collected for clinical and operational screening purposes.
I understand test interpretation and treatment guidance require consultation with a licensed provider.
I consent to the collection and secure handling of this information as protected health data.

medicationPricing.title: Medication Pricing and Payment Disclaimer
lines: All medication is self-pay. Insurance is not accepted.
Supported pharmacies: CVS or Walgreens. Pricing varies by state.
Sample prices: Azithromycin ($20-$30), Doxycycline ($30-$60), Cefixime ($20-$30), Acyclovir ($40-$50), Metronidazole ($10-$20).
